hooks.command: [ -e .git ] || { echo "Be sure to return to the repo root when you finish! Otherwise the other stop hooks cannot run correctly." >&2; exit 2; }

HASH=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; BASE=${GIT_BASE_BRANCH:-main}; DIFF=$(git diff "${BASE}"...HEAD --stat 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; [ -z "$DIFF" ] && exit 0; [ -f ".autofix/plans/${HASH}_verified.md" ] && exit 0; echo "Run /autofix to verify your changes before finishing." >&2; exit 2

HASH=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; BASE=${GIT_BASE_BRANCH:-main}; DIFF=$(git diff "${BASE}"...HEAD --stat 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; [ -z "$DIFF" ] && exit 0; [ -f ".reviews/conversation/${HASH}.json" ] && exit 0; echo "Run /verify-conversation to review the conversation before finishing." >&2; exit 2
